done.title: Auth provider instant switching via DB

architecture_notes_for_agents: switchToProvider() writes directly to DB — no admin API auth needed. PG_CONNECTION_STRING required.
clerkSignIn() sets active org via setActive({session, organization:'org_3DOdRcnABqYWyilVRsqOSMUmKMj'}) + page.reload().
Authentik form uses Shadow DOM — getByLabel() not input[name=...]. Multi-step: username→Enter→password→Enter.
t001-run.js E2 badge failure = expected until smoke passes. Not a regression.
DB auth_provider = clerk (correct). Do not change without Manager instruction.
Run command pattern for Playwright: write runner script, fire with &, poll /tmp/playwright-result.json.
NEVER run npx playwright test directly — run_command exits non-zero on test failure and tool throws.
